--- match_coverage_search_prefixes.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Search Prefixes
MATCH ALL (p1:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f1:Person)
MATCH ANY (p2:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f2:Person)
MATCH ANY SHORTEST (p3:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f3:Person)
MATCH ANY CHEAPEST (p4:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f4:Person)
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       34,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 40,
                    EndPos:   43,
                    Prefix:   "ALL",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  44,
                          Rparen:  54,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 45,
                              NameEnd: 47,
                              Name:    "p1",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 47,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 48,
                                  NameEnd: 54,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  55,
                          EndPos:    66,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 57,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 58,
                                  NameEnd: 63,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLSymbolQuantifier{
                          OpPos: 66,
                          Op:    "+",
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  67,
                          Rparen:  77,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 68,
                              NameEnd: 70,
                              Name:    "f1",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 70,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 71,
                                  NameEnd: 77,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       79,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 85,
                    EndPos:   88,
                    Prefix:   "ANY",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  89,
                          Rparen:  99,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 90,
                              NameEnd: 92,
                              Name:    "p2",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 92,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 93,
                                  NameEnd: 99,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  100,
                          EndPos:    111,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,

                          OpPos: 111,

                        },

                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  112,
                          Rparen:  122,

                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 113,
                              NameEnd: 115,

                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 115,

                                  Name:    "Person",

                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       124,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 130,
                    EndPos:   142,
                    Prefix:   "ANY SHORTEST",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  143,

                          },

                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLSymbolQuantifier{
                          OpPos: 165,
                          Op:    "+",
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  166,
                          Rparen:  176,

                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       178,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  SearchPrefix: &ast.GQLPathSearchPrefix{
                    StartPos: 184,
                    EndPos:   196,
                    Prefix:   "ANY CHEAPEST",
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  197,
                          Rparen:  207,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 198,
                              NameEnd: 200,
                              Name:    "p4",

                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 200,

                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 201,
                                  NameEnd: 207,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  208,
                          EndPos:    219,

                            EmptyPos: -1,

                              Colon: 210,

                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 211,
                                  NameEnd: 216,
                                  Name:    "Knows",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Quantifier: &ast.GQLSymbolQuantifier{
                          OpPos: 219,
                          Op:    "+",

                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  220,
                          Rparen:  230,

                              NamePos: 221,
                              NameEnd: 223,
                              Name:    "f4",

                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 223,

                                  NamePos: 224,
                                  NameEnd: 230,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 232,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 239,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH ALL (p1:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f1:Person) MATCH ANY (p2:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f2:Person) MATCH ANY SHORTEST (p3:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f3:Person) MATCH ANY CHEAPEST (p4:Person)-[:Knows]->+(f4:Person) RETURN *
